case_title: MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. VS MEDINA JOSEFA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $415.99 FILED BY MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA JOSEFA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA JOSEFA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDINA JOSEFA $415.99 PRINCIPAL, $97.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $513.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA JOSEFA

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $629.61 AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA JOSEFA
